description: A project manager sees that a key engineer is overallocated for the next month and must reassign some of their tasks.

nodes.task_description: Run a resource utilization report for the engineering team.

expected_outcome.value: The report shows one engineer is allocated at 150% for the next month.

nodes.task_description: Identify the tasks assigned to the overallocated engineer and find another qualified engineer with available capacity.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a suitable engineer who is only allocated at 60%.

nodes.task_description: Reassign two of the tasks from the overallocated engineer to the available engineer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the task assignments, resolving the overallocation.
